name: Easy Peanut Butter Bonbons
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine peanut butter, butter and powdered sugar, stirring until smooth.
2. Shape into balls.
3. Melt chocolate and shortening over hot (not boiling) water.
4. Dip balls into chocolate, cool slightly, and roll in chopped nuts.
5. Put balls on waxed paper-lined baking sheet and refrigerate until firm.
